newsletter.title: Keep updated
newsletter.description: Keep updated with the latest releases by subscribing to our newsletter.
newsletter.privacy: By subscribing, you accept our Privacy Policy and agree to receive updates from ESSNCE
newsletter.error: An error occurred, please try again.

about.title: ABOUT US
about.description:
ESSNCE manufactures perfumes of high quality at a low price. The perfumes are manufactured in France and are 100% vegan and cruelty-free.

We are extremely happy that you found us and we hope you find your new favorite perfume. If you have any questions, please <contact>click here</contact> or send a DM on Instagram <instagram>@essnce.edp</instagram>

quiz.description: Fill in your perfume preferences so our perfume experts give you a personalized recommendation for an ESSNCE perfume that matches your wishes.

christmasCalendars.title: Discover more Christmas calendars
christmasCalendars.description: Are you interested in a Christmas calendar but unsure if this is the right one? Here you will find more calendars that fit all tastes and sizes!

family.title: If you like {{productName}}
family.description:
...it seems you like perfumes in the family {{family}}.
Then we would like to recommend these perfumes that fall into the same family, also fruity, fresh and incredibly nice!

moreOf.title: More of {{productName}}
moreOf.description: Whether you want to surround yourself with the scent at home or wear it in another way, we have options that fit all different occasions.

tester.title: Deciding?
tester.description: We have testers on all of our perfumes that you can order as a ready-made kit or individually. Test the scent at home in peace before you commit to a 50 ml perfume.

travelSize.title: Liiitle more....?
travelSize.description: Is 2ml too little? Here we have collected all travel sizes for you who want a little extra dose of your favorite scent!

addExtraTester.title: Add an extra!
addExtraTester.description: Was there a scent you wanted to test but was missing in this kit? Add an extra tester to have the opportunity to smell all the scents you are interested in!

title.testers: Take advantage of testing more scents at once!

seeAllKits.description: Here we have collected all test kits for you who are interested in testing multiple scents at once!

fillNecessaire.title: Fill your necessaire!
fillNecessaire.description: Take advantage of filling your necessaire with goodies! Add an extra tester to have the opportunity to smell all the scents you are interested in!

fullSize.title: Would you rather have a full size?

aboutUs.heading: About us
aboutUs.description: I started ESSNCE because I was tired of spending several thousand dollars on perfumes! ESSNCE is a cruelty-free and vegan perfume brand that offers high-quality perfumes at an affordable price.

notFound.title: The page you are looking for does not exist...
notFound.description: But don't worry! We have a lot of other interesting things to show you!

monitor.title: {{productName}}
monitor.description: Fill in your email address below to get an email when we have this perfume back in stock!

scent_families.heading: Scent families
scent_families.description: Are you unsure about which scent you are interested in? Here you will find an overview of our scent families and the perfumes we recommend for each group!

collections.allProductsDescription: Here we have collected all of our products! Everything from perfumes to test kits and advent calendars can be found here. If you want to search for something specific, you can use the filter function below.
collections.collectionsDescription: Here we have collected all of our collections, from perfumes to test kits and advent calendars! Click on a collection to see all of its products.
